props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggle the disabled state for the component.

props.name: label
props.description: Add a caption for a component.

props.name: max
props.description: Specifies the maximum value for the component.

props.name: min
props.description: Specifies the minimum value for the component.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Method called immediately after the `value` prop changes.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Toggle the readonly state for the component.

props.name: step
props.description: Specifies the interval between legal numbers in the component.
